The IG is not for the international realm, and it uses SNOMED CT, so it should fix the SCT edition in the expansion parameters

URL value 'http://hopitalTest.fr/fhir/namingsystem/encounters' does not resolve

The ImplementationGuide uses package ans.fr.nos#1.3.0 released on 2024-08-29, but the most recent appropriate version is 1.5.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered
'High' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR
Unable to resolve resource with reference 'https://exampleserver.org/fhir/Practitioner/1'
'low' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR
ValueSet 'http://hl7.org/fhir/hspc/ValueSet/bpMeasBodyLocationPrecoordVS' not found
There are no valid display names found for the code http://loinc.org#8480-6 for language(s) 'fr-FR'. The display is 'Systolic blood pressure' the default language display
'Normal' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR
There are no valid display names found for the code http://loinc.org#8462-4 for language(s) 'fr-FR'. The display is 'Diastolic blood pressure' the default language display
'low' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.0.1, 5.1.0, 5.2.0. Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order|5.2.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/organization-period'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.0.1, 5.1.0, 5.2.0. Review the extension type for fr-core-patient-birth-list-given-name: the context of Patient.name appears to be a simple element, so the context type should be 'element' not 'fhirpath'

fr-core-1: The left side is inherently a collection, and so the expression 'extension.where(url = 'https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-identity-reliability').extension.where(url = 'identityStatus').value.code = 'VALI'' may fail or return false if there is more than one item in the content being evaluated
